atten4.ptxt: Remove interior parts so that the front No. 1 speaker can be seen.

s2.ptxt: If the result is not as specified, reinstall the front No. 1 speaker.

specitem.ptxt: The cone paper of the speaker is not torn.

s2.ptxt: If the result is not as specified, replace the front No. 1 speaker.

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the front No. 1 speaker connector.
Measure the resistance between the terminals of the speaker.
If the result is not as specified, replace the front No. 1 speaker.

atten4.ptxt: Remove interior parts so that the front No. 2 speaker can be seen.

s2.ptxt: If the result is not as specified, reinstall the front No. 2 speaker.

specitem.ptxt: The cone paper of the speaker is not torn.

s2.ptxt: If the result is not as specified, replace the front No. 2 speaker.
